# Release Checklist

## Scope

## Owner

## Pre-Release

- PRD approved
- trust review completed
- security review completed
- migrations tested
- rollback plan documented
- analytics events validated
- moderation team informed
- support guidance prepared

## Release

- deploy to staging
- validate health checks
- validate core user journeys
- deploy to production
- monitor logs, errors, and trust alerts

## Post-Release

- review metrics after 1 hour
- review metrics after 24 hours
- review abuse and moderation signals
- record lessons learned
